/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,libturtle_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so -o libturtle_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so CMakeFiles/turtle_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_cpp/turtle_interfaces/srv/switch_mode__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib: /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
